project_type: Java CDK project (AWS CDK with Java bindings) - event-driven sleep audio processing pipeline
build_system: Maven 3.9+ with CDK CLI (npx cdk). NODE_OPTIONS must be cleared for CDK commands.
test_framework: JUnit 5 with CDK assertions (Template.fromStack). 15 test files, 100+ assertions.
verification_instructions: Documentation-only change. No build/test required unless code files are modified.
setup_instructions: Java 17, Maven 3.9+, Node.js 20+ required. Run 'mvn compile' to build.
environment_constraints: NODE_OPTIONS must be cleared for CDK/jsii commands. No Docker required for testing.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits (feat/fix/chore/docs/refactor). TDD-first. Update ARCHITECTURE.md Mermaid diagram if structure changes.
